text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is just about to start.
Mejiro McQueen calmly reflects on everything
that's led up to this day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She thinks back on the effort both she and I have
put forth and on her many experiences competing
with her rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She also recalls her race against Mejiro Ryan, who
showed a sense of resolve stronger than ever
before in the Takarazuka Kinen

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Filled with determination, Mejiro McQueen vows
to expend all her power to win today's autumn
Tenno Sho.
